hotel_name: Amanda Boutique - Căn hộ dịch vụ & Khách sạn Bình Dương (Amanda Boutique - Serviced Apartment & Hotel Binh Duong)

reviews.title: Avoiding is a walk.
reviews.text: The room was much smaller than shown in the images, the bathroom had an unpleasant odor, and there were other people's hair on the bedding, which was quite disappointing. The hotel markets itself as offering huge discounts from a very high original price, but the actual room condition was poor even compared to the discounted rate. Anyway, I was so disappointed with this Hanoi business trip... I hope next time the hotel will show honest pricing that matches the actual room quality.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Location is good. However cleanliness is questionable. Furniture fittings show wear and tear.

reviews.title: Need to Improve
reviews.text:
Location is good. It is quiet at the central of Thu Dau Mot. Just need to pay attention if you want to go out/in at night. Make sure u've got transport, if not u will be walking in a black pitch street (300m) and it can be creepy.
The room was so big, and exactly like its shown on the pics. Unfortunately when I arrived everything was dusty, so I had to wipe some of surfaces with sanitizers myself. Plus, I dont know if its vietnamese thingy or not but I hardly found any bins in our room, unless it is a toilet. So I kinda had to prepare a plastic bag n used it as a bin (not quite a hassle, but better if there was any). 
Last but not least, No one actually guarded the place, so when I arrived, I had to wait for more than 20mnts (I guess) only to check in after staff finally came in.

reviews.title: There's a loft and the kids are thrilled.
reviews.text: The children were very happy in the loft. Although there were some issues, such as the shower not being thoroughly cleaned and the desk mounted on the wall being wobbly, I think it is a wonderful place to stay for a short period with family.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Good value for money

reviews.title: The apartment-style hotel with a kitchen and self-check-in is quite interesting.
reviews.text: I chose this hotel because I wanted a mini apartment to take care of my baby. Generally speaking, the room is clean, spacious, and the hot and cold water in the bathroom is good. The staff cleans and refills items daily. The only downside is that the microwave wasn't cleaned, so it has a bit of a smell, and the pipes in the sink always have an odor.
reviews.response: Dạ em cảm ơn chị nhiều nhé! Em sẽ dặn dò nhân viên làm thật kỹ hơn nữa ạ

reviews.title: Clean, Cheap and Convenient
reviews.text: Well priced, nice clean little apartment style room - no safety box in room - many restaurants within walking distance - a nice little gym around the corner too.
reviews.response: Thank you so much. Wishing you all good things .

reviews.title: It is a clean and good accommodation.
reviews.text: It's a good accommodation for the price. It's a new building, so the place is clean and quiet. Everything was clean and nice. However, there is no one to guide you at check-in, so you have to call the local phone number to check in, which can be difficult. At check-out, you just leave the key at the counter. You won't meet a guide during your stay.

reviews.title: Hotel
reviews.text: Check-in/out is free, I haven't met any staff at all. The room is cute, well-designed but not well-maintained, clean and tidy.

Phòng cách âm chưa được tốt, có thể nghe được tiếng lục đục và tiếng dọn phòng ở kế bên. 

Các tiện ích còn lại đầy đủ, có máy giặt, sấy ở tầng hầm, phòng rộng, thoải mái.

reviews.title: Good bang for the buck
reviews.text: Khách sạn rất sạch, phòng rộng, toilet rộng nhưng hạng phòng mình thì cái khu để tắm nó khá nhỏ nhé.

reviews.title: Beautiful room
reviews.text: A wonderful experience, the room is smartly designed, tidy, clean, and the warm colors suit my taste. Check-in and check-out are quick and smooth, the location is convenient, and the room is quiet for my family to have a good sleep. I will recommend it to my friends and will come back when I have the chance. Thank you to the staff for always responding quickly.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The surroundings are quiet, so you can rest comfortably. And there are restaurants and cafes nearby, so it is easy to access.

reviews.title: I highly recommend it.
reviews.text: The schedule was long, so I stayed for a long time. The accommodation was very clean and the facilities were good. There was a large refrigerator, an iron, and even a hairdryer. They also provided free laundry service and dishwashing service. It had a spacious duplex, with enough dishes and a microwave, making it suitable for family members to stay as well. It's a place I would want to come back to next time!

reviews.title: 정전으로 하루 종일 찜통. 안내 없음.
reviews.text:
정전으로 하루 종일 찜통
안내 없음

프론트 직원 없는, 실제 무인텔
이불에 검은 먼지 다수
개미 천국
샤워실 배수 안되어, 화장실 물 들어참
reviews.response:
1. 도시 전역의 정전. 정전을 일으킨 것은 내가 아니었습니다.
2. 체크인 시간 12시간 전에 안내했는데 답변을 받지 못했습니다.
3. 나는 그 문제를 알고 있었고 당신도 그것을 좋아하지 않았기 때문에 당신에게 방값을 청구하지 않았습니다.
4. 오늘 오후 2시부터 제 호텔에 묵으시고 다음날 오후 3시에 체크아웃하세요. 체크아웃 시간은 정오 12시입니다.
5. 당신은 고의로 내 사업을 방해하는 불합리한 사람입니다.

reviews.title: Dịch vụ kém
reviews.text: Dịch vụ kém
reviews.response:
Your reviews are completely unfair and unacceptable.
It was the weekend with many guests, so check-in was later than usual. This was explained clearly. If you cannot understand such a simple situation and still leave bad reviews, then please do not book my hotel again in the future.
From now on, if you try to book, we will not welcome you as before. You will only get the lowest floors or check-in strictly on time.

reviews.title: Good Place in Week days
reviews.text:
Good return in terms of price. 
It got elevator, a sofa in the room. The wifi quality is fine, and guests can watch YouTube/Netflix on TV. However, it somehow got lag to watch Netflix, maybe the host needs to check the network setting.

There’re a lot restaurants and coffe shops nearby; you can also book foods on GRAB, which is convenient.
The stay price in the weekend is much higher than other hotels.
